data.title: London's Heathrow, Collins Aerospace Ink Long-Term Deal To Enhance Airport Operations
data.description: Collins Aerospace renews 6-year deal with Heathrow AOC for ARINC cMUSE solution, plans to explore new technologies to enhance passenger experience.

data.title: JPMorgan's Jamie Dimon Warns Recession Now 'Likely Outcome'
data.description: "Negotiate some trade deals," Dimon urged the Trump administration. "It could get worse if we don't make progress."

data.title: Comcast Bets Big On UK Tourism With First Universal European Theme Park
data.description: Comcast Corp (NASDAQ: CMCSA) is expanding its global reach with plans to build Universal's first-ever theme park in Europe. Located near Bedford, UK, the immersive resort will feature themed lands, a hotel, and retail spaces. The site offers excellent rail links, giving millions easy access. Pending government approval, construction could start in 2026.

data.title: Why Lumen Technologies Stock Is Up On Wednesday
data.description: Lumen partners with Google Cloud to expand AI networking.

data.title: Suze Orman Says Too Many People Think Their Spouse Will Need Just 50% Of Their Household Income When They Die – Here's Why They're Wrong
